name: Itachi Uchiha — Tears of the Crow
description:
Itachi Uchiha, the prodigy of the Hidden Leaf who sacrificed everything for peace. Cloaked in the Akatsuki mantle with the Sharingan blazing crimson, he walks the path of shadows knowing the truth no one else can see. A single crow perched on his finger holds Shisui's final gift — Kotoamatsukami, the unbreakable genjutsu that can rewrite destiny itself.

This piece captures the stillness before the storm: the weight of a clan's annihilation, the love for a brother too young to understand, and the quiet resignation of a shinobi who chose the world over himself. The amaterasu flames flicker at the edges, never truly extinguished.
